objective: Fix GitHub issue #116: Cursor interaction query unknown case causes HTTP 400 and stream disconnection. Handle unknown query cases gracefully instead of throwing, update tests, verify, record devlog.

workPhases.title: Fix planInteractionQueryReply to handle unknown query cases gracefully

tasks.title: Replace throw on unknown query.case with graceful empty InteractionResponse return
Replace throw on setupVmEnvironmentArgs with graceful empty InteractionResponse return
Update tests in cursor-interaction-query.test.ts to verify graceful handling
Run full cursor test suite to verify no regressions

criteria.scenario: planInteractionQueryReply handles case: undefined without throwing
criteria.expectedEvidence: Test 'unknown interaction query cases are handled gracefully instead of throwing (#116)' passes, returning response with matching id and unsupported:unknown replyCase
criteria.capturedEvidence: bun test cursor-interaction-query.test.ts: 14/14 pass. Test verifies plan.response.id === 42, plan.response.result.case === undefined, plan.replyCase === 'unsupported:unknown'

criteria.scenario: No regressions in existing cursor tests
criteria.expectedEvidence: bun test tests/cursor-*.test.ts passes all tests with 0 failures
criteria.capturedEvidence: bun test v1.3.14: 265 pass, 0 fail, 894 expect() calls, Ran 265 tests across 30 files [1.83s]

criteria.scenario: Devlog recorded documenting root cause and fix
criteria.capturedEvidence: File created at .codexclaw/devlogs/260713_cursor_interaction_query_unknown.md with root cause analysis, fix description, and verification results
